title: Content Site with Astro + MDX
description: Complete route for a content-focused site (blog, docs, marketing) built with Astro — from project setup to production deployment with zero-JS by default.

steps.description: Initialize an Astro project with content collections and TypeScript (strict)
Add Tailwind CSS via the official Astro integration
Optionally add shadcn/ui for interactive UI islands (Button, Dialog, etc.)
Add unit testing for utility functions and content transformations
Add end-to-end tests for navigation, search, and content rendering
Add error monitoring for SSR pages and API routes
Deploy to Vercel with automatic CDN, image optimization, and preview deployments
